docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,513.60 FILED BY 101 ROOFING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVY, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
